training_status: moderate resistance training 3-4x weekly, 20-30 min sessions, no cardio

benefits.description: Lost approximately 50 lbs over 4-5 months (from 226 lbs to 175 lbs). Achieved visible abdominal definition (4-pack visible for first time). Body composition scan showed approximately 15% body fat.
Made caloric restriction much easier to maintain

protocol_notes: Started 2023-09-23. Titration: 0.25 mg/week for 2 weeks, then increased to 0.5 mg/week and maintained at that dose. User notes stayed at lowest dose of efficacy. Combined with resistance training and protein intake (~80g daily). User emphasizes semaglutide as a tool, not a standalone solution; credits diet adherence and exercise as foundational.
